chapters.title: One Piece
chapters.summary: 'Nerona Imu Descends' — Imu reveals their true demonic form for the first time: S-shaped horns, a tail, wings, white hair, and Hagoromo cloud markings resembling an awakened Zoan user. They descend on Aurust Castle in Elbaph as the Five Elders fail to stop them. Zoro formulates a tactical plan after Gerd discovers Sommer's heart. Ch.1180 on break until April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Nano Machine
chapters.summary: 'Disaster Above a Ship (5)' — Chun Yeowun's enemies attempt to use a baby as a hostage to gain leverage. Hu Bong is alarmed but trusts Yeowun, who stays ahead of his enemies as if anticipating their every move. Yang Danwa is shown to genuinely fear Yeowun's capabilities.

chapters.title: Dandadan
chapters.summary: 'What's Going On Here?!' — The group visits an amusement park. Okarun and Aira plan to meet up with Momo and Jiji. Jiji, who had been holding Momo's hand, reveals he was quietly channeling his ki into her to relieve a chest pain she mentioned — a tender moment amid the lighthearted group outing.

chapters.title: Blue Lock
chapters.summary: Karasu asserts dominance in Japan's World Cup match, maneuvering Shidou and setting up Barou to score — effectively 'devouring' Shidou's position. Karasu declares himself the one 'running the show', leaving Isagi questioning his own place on the team. France's coach Rodin pressures Loki and Hugo to adopt a more aggressive counterattack strategy.

chapters.title: Sakamoto Days
chapters.summary: Set against a Tokyo-wide power outage near an old castle. Shishiba battles Gozu in an intense duel — Gozu's static electricity forces Shishiba to tie his hair back in a ponytail. Gozu destroys Shishiba's hammer but the fight ends without a clear victor. Standout artwork using lighting and shadow effects. Ch.255 due April 13, 2026.

chapters.title: Kingdom
chapters.summary: 'Allies' Self-Sacrifice' — part of the Great War of Qin and Zhao Arc. The Qin military campaigns continue on multiple fronts. Weekly serialization ongoing in Young Jump.

chapters.title: Eleceed
chapters.summary: 'Shadows' — Tension between the Korean Awakened Association and the World Academy reaches a boiling point following a challenge to the Top 10 students. Jiwoo trains with Kartein, learning to incorporate healing mana into his electrical strikes to prevent physical recoil during high-intensity combat. 37 pages.

chapters.title: Spy x Family
chapters.summary: Yor has an upcoming kiss scene in a film. Yuri panics and fails to remove it; he then asks Loid to replace the lead actor. When a terrorist points a gun at Yor, Loid intervenes. Ultimately Yuri, dressed as Yor's character, performs the scene — his intimidating aura leads the actor to ad-lib a platonic version that audiences love. Ch.132 due April 12, 2026.

chapters.title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
chapters.summary: 'Context of the Constellations (1)' — Three years after Kim Dokja's disappearance, Jung Heewon leads the legendary Chungcheong Alliance. She harbors deep resentment toward her sponsor constellation Uriel, who vanished after the demon king selection. When Uriel tries to re-establish a contract, Heewon attempts to use 'Hour of Judgement' against her, but constellations of good intervene. Heewon tells Uriel to seek Kim Dokja herself — he's at the top of the fortress.

chapters.title: Marriage Toxin
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Anime adaptation by Bones Film premiered April 7, 2026. Series has 17 tankōbon volumes with 1,000,000+ copies in circulation.

chapters.title: WITCH WATCH
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Weekly Shonen Jump continues. Series collected into 25 tankōbon volumes as of March 2026.

chapters.title: One Punch Man
chapters.summary: 'Life or Death' — Flashy Flash eliminates Heavy Smoker, surprising Tanktop Master. Tatsumaki faces emerging insect swarms after seemingly defeating Aggregation. Part of the Neo Heroes Uprising Arc. Ch.226 'Fury' featured the Hero Name Victims Association protest rally at Hero Association HQ and five simultaneous Dragon-level threats appearing.

chapters.title: Chainsaw Man
chapters.summary: 'Thank You, Chainsaw Man' (FINAL CHAPTER) — Pochita sacrifices itself to erase the Chainsaw Devil from existence. Denji wakes in a reset reality without Pochita, back to his pre-series life. Killed by the Zombie Devil again, but this time Power saves him. Nayuta recruits both to attend high school. Denji encounters Asa at school just before she would have killed Bucky; she calls him 'Chainsaw Man', hinting Pochita still lives within him. Series concluded — no Part 3 announced. Final Vol.24 due June 4, 2026.

chapters.title: Frieren
chapters.summary: Last chapter before the manga entered indefinite hiatus. Publisher cited the need to adjust serialization pace and prioritize the health of creators Yamada and Abe. No return date announced. Series has 15 tankōbon volumes.

chapters.title: Tower of God
chapters.summary: 'S3 End' — Season 3 finale. Adori declares she will go to FUG to kill Baam. Major faction conflicts between FUG and the Tower's ruling families. Hints that entity V is attempting to strengthen Baam as a vessel — though Baam shows potential to surpass V entirely. Series on hiatus following Season 3's conclusion.

chapters.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: Season 2 Finale — Sung Suho battles three Monarch Successors simultaneously: descendants of the Plague, Transfiguration, and Giants Monarchs. Esil and Gray combine powers via their Beast Possession Bond Skill to rescue Sirka from Arsha. Series on hiatus after artist JIN departed for mandatory military service. Expected return with new artist ~May 2026.

chapters.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
chapters.summary: Original series concluded at Ch.271 'From Now On'. The direct sequel 'JJK Modulo' ran September 2025–March 2026 (25 chapters), ending with Yuji and Nobara planning to counter remaining curses; Yuji's fate sealed — destined to become a Cursed Object like Sukuna. Combined finale marks the full end of the JJK saga.

chapters.title: My Hero Academia
chapters.summary: Epilogue (FINAL CHAPTER) — Set eight years after the Final War. Class 1-A reunites to celebrate Shoto becoming the #2 Hero. Ochaco runs Quirk Counselling. Izuku finally confesses his feelings to Ochaco and they begin a relationship. Toya (Dabi) confirmed to have died in the intervening years. A special anime episode adapting this chapter is planned for 2026.

chapters.title: Kaiju No. 8
chapters.summary: FINAL CHAPTER — Kafka Hibino awakens from a four-month coma after the final battle against Kaiju No. 9, which triggered 1,316 monster appearances nationwide. Reassigned to a new unit with his Kaiju No. 8 identity kept secret, Kafka discovers he still retains his transformation ability. Reno, Kikoru, and others reunite to welcome him back as Defense Force enlistment quadruples. Anime 'Final Chapter' arc by Production I.G in production.

chapters.title: Vinland Saga
chapters.summary: 'Somewhere Not Here' (FINAL CHAPTER) — Thorfinn departs Vinland with survivors, offering wheat seeds to the Lnu as reparations. The Lnu warchief raises Ivar's sword as a reminder that violence persists even in a land of peace. Niska stows away on a Norse boat, mirroring young Thorfinn's own journey. The story closes on Plmk's wheat growing — quiet optimism for future peace between peoples. Series concluded after 20 years of publication.
